name: Ravager
description: High-damage explosive shotgun for point-blank fights. Pellets and splash can erase targets up close, but it fires slowly and burns ammo, using 4 shells per shot. Wide spread suits large enemies. Past close range you must lead targets to land multiple pellets.
notes: World drop. Card damage underrates it, as it ignores the explosive bonus. Only spawns at blue rarity or higher. May trigger Krieg skills differently depending on whether the kill is from pellet damage, splash, or both. Gaige Close Enough can ricochet pellets so they detonate at range. Salvador Keep Firing... helps the low fire rate and reload. Claptrap One Last Thing boosts splash on the second-to-last shot and pellet damage on the last, suiting the small magazine.
